evals.prompt: Add a new town mechanic where the player can donate gold to a shrine and see the blessing in the town UI.
evals.expected_output: Maps the feature across entry, state, event, presenter, UI, and test surfaces, and keeps the work centered on the 6-hop chain rather than a single system file.
expectations: Names a town action or equivalent entry surface
Requires a proving test strategy beyond state-only checks

evals.prompt: Implement a new combat mechanic where a curse stacks on hit and changes what the player sees in the HUD.
evals.expected_output: Treats the ask as cross-layer mechanic work, names state/event/presenter/UI surfaces, and calls out any extra status or animation follow-up instead of burying it.
expectations: Maps the mechanic across the 6-hop chain
Calls out extra status or animation work when relevant

evals.prompt: I need a new mechanic that references live content IDs for relics and quests. What else has to change besides the system code?
evals.expected_output: Adds contract-test requirements and cross-reference validation instead of limiting the answer to runtime code.
expectations: Requires contract coverage for live IDs
Mentions content or generated-index implications if data is added
Does not stop at only game-core system changes
